metadata.title: Vertigo / Relight My Fire
metadata.lyrics:
[03:56.98] Help me escape this feelin' of insecurity, ah-ah
[04:04.12] I need you so much, but I don't think you really need me, ah-ah
[04:12.15] But if we all stand up in the name of love
[04:16.16] And state the case of what we're dreamin' of
[04:20.11] I've got to say I only dream of you
[04:24.06] But like a thief in the night
[04:26.55] You took away the love that I knew, oh, oh-oh-oh-oh
[04:33.33] Relight my fire
[04:37.28] Your love is my only desire
[04:41.24] Relight my fire
[04:44.09] 'Cause I need your love (I need your love)

[04:53.14] Your love is my only desire

[05:11.84]

[05:20.28] Yeah
[05:22.45] Turn back the times 'til the days when our love was new
[05:27.65] Do you remember?
[05:30.37] No matter what was happenin', I was there with you
[05:37.62] Well, if we all stand up for what we believe
[05:41.61] And maybe live within our possibilities
[05:45.61] The world would be wild for the dream
[05:49.54] So baby, don't turn away

[05:58.82] Relight my fire
[06:02.72] Your love is my only desire

[06:22.63] Relight my fire
[06:25.33] 'Cause I need, oh, I need your love

[06:41.25] There's a new day on the other side (yeah)
[06:45.19] You got to have hope in your soul (yeah)
[06:49.14] Just keep on walkin' yeah, yeah, uh-uh
[06:53.19] Just keep on walkin', yeah, yeah, yeah

[07:26.21] Relight my fire

[07:42.11] Relight my fire
